tools.name: preflight
tools.description: What a domain publishes for AI agents before you touch it: ai-catalog.json (ARD), llms.txt, agents.md, and its robots.txt directives for AI bots (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, Google-Extended…). Served from the Desvela ARD index when fresh (<7 days), live-checked otherwise. Free.

tools.name: watch
tools.description: Subscribe to a domain: get a signed webhook (X-Desvela-Signature, HMAC-SHA256) when what it publishes for AI agents changes — ai-catalog.json entries added/changed/gone, llms.txt or agents.md edited or removed, robots.txt AI-bot directives changed. Checked weekly against the Desvela ARD index. Retur

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "watch" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Subscribe to a domain: get a signed webhook (X-Desvela-Signature, HMAC-SHA256) when what it publishes for AI agents changes — ai-catalog.json entries added/chan…
